title: Customer Refund Priority Lane
description: A payments-and-settlement workflow that controls release, routing, and execution timing across multiple rails and liquidity constraints. Focus case: customer refund priority lane.
assumptions: System has strong, observable state so reservations and releases are reliably visible to orchestrators.
Settlement windows and rails expose deterministic availability flags used by the workflow.
Idempotent operations and compensating releases are available to recover from partial failures.
risks: Liquidity shortfall on a reserved bucket causing delays or failed settlements for priority refunds.
Inter-rail latency or outage leading to missed settlement windows and refund duplication risk.
Insufficient authorization provenance or stale credentials causing regulatory non-compliance or failed execution.
